case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL VS VELEZ ANGEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,132.80 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ ANGEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELEZ ANGEL $1,132.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,187.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $181.83 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ ANGEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VELEZ ANGEL
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION REC'D FROM THE SHERIFF DEPT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF NOV-08-1994, GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE .
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE FUNDS HELD TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR. LEVY IS LIFTED.

SAN MATEO COUNTY W R I T RELEASED BY CLAIM OF EXEMPTION HEARING.
